name: Crab Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom of a pie pan with pastry; refrigerate for 1 hour.
2. Preheat oven to 450°F.
3. Mix crabmeat with parsley, wine or vermouth, salt, and pepper in a separate bowl.
4. In another bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, and cayenne pepper.
5. Brush the pastry edges with egg white.
6. Fill the pie crust with the crab mixture.
7. Pour the egg mixture over the top of the quiche.
8. Sprinkle paprika evenly across the surface.
9. Bake for 10 minutes at 450°F.
10. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake an additional 40 minutes, or until set. The quiche is done when a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
